title: Principal Instructional Designer at Lido Learning

jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at Lido Learning
jsonLd.description:
Lido Learning invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Kanpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Lido Learning:
Lido Learning is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lido Learning!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
